etymology: Mayerson = son of the mayor; Barney = son of consolation
wordplay_note: Son of authority who loses all authority over reality
card_description: Barney Mayerson (meaning "Mayerson = son of the mayor; Barney = son of consolation") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch*. Pre-Fash precog consultant who is drafted to Mars and must choose between Can-D and Chew-Z. Name note: Son of authority who loses all authority over reality. The everyman forced to choose between competing simulated realities. First appears in *The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch*.
first_work: The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch
work_list: The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch

reference.brief: Pre-Fash precog consultant who is drafted to Mars and must choose between Can-D and Chew-Z
reference.etymology: Mayerson = son of the mayor; Barney = son of consolation
